# Proper-noun blacklist — terms the translator MUST NOT touch.
# Generated by i18n_extract_proper_nouns.mjs from app_i18n_en.json.
# Edit freely: add lines to force a term to stay verbatim, remove
# lines to let the translator have at it.
# Sorted: longest first (so multi-word matches win over substrings).
# One term per line. Blank lines and lines starting with # are ignored.
#
# Source EN keys: 38887
# Total unique terms: 3166
